hero.subtitle: Smart QR and NFC identification for humans and pets. Ensure first responders always have the critical information they need to save lives.

problem.title: When seconds count, silence is fatal.

phones.title: Locked Phones
phones.desc: In an emergency, you can't unlock your phone to show emergency contacts or medical history.

allergies.title: Unknown Allergies
allergies.desc: Administering the wrong medication during a crisis can turn a bad situation into a tragedy instantly.

pets.title: Lost Pets
pets.desc: Traditional tags only hold a phone number. They don't hold vet info, dietary needs, or alternate contacts.

solution.title: Your digital lifeline, securely attached to you.
solution.desc: LifeTag allows you to create comprehensive digital emergency profiles and link them to multiple modern devices like NFC wristbands, stickers, and keychains. Anyone with a smartphone can scan your LifeTag to instantly access your critical info.

one.title: Create Profile
one.desc: Add medical history, allergies, and emergency contacts into our secure cloud.

two.title: Link Devices
two.desc: Activate NFC/QR bands or stickers by linking them to your profile via the dashboard.

three.title: Emergency Access
three.desc: First responders simply tap or scan your tag to instantly view your emergency page.

features.title: Powerful Features
features.subtitle: Built from the ground up to be reliable, flexible, and completely secure.

devices.title: Multiple Devices per Profile
devices.desc: Link a wristband, a bike sticker, and a wallet card all to the same profile.

control.title: Individual Device Control
control.desc: Lose a tag? Unlink it instantly from your dashboard without affecting the others.

notifications.title: Scan Notifications
notifications.desc: Get SMS or Email alerts instantly when your tag is scanned by a responder.

pets.title: Profiles for Pets
pets.desc: Create specialized profiles for pets including vet info, rewards, and rabies vaccination status.

realtime.title: Real-time Updates
realtime.desc: Change your medication or contact info online. Devices update instantly.

noApp.title: No App Required
noApp.desc: Responpected do not need an app. They just scan using their native phone camera.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Protect yourself and your loved ones today.

essential.name: Essential
essential.desc: For individuals who want basic protection.

family.name: Family
family.desc: Total peace of mind for the whole household.

pro.name: Pro
pro.desc: For large families, caretakers, and organizations.

tokens.title: Encrypted Tokens
tokens.desc: Every device URL is cryptographically secure and unguessable.

privacy.title: Privacy First
privacy.desc: You control what information is public. Hide your profile at any time.

cloud.title: Secure Cloud
cloud.desc: Enterprise-grade infrastructure ensures 99.99% uptime when you need it.

cta.title: Be prepared. Stay protected.
cta.desc: Join thousands of individuals and families who trust LifeTag to keep them safe in emergencies. Start your journey to peace of mind today.

footer.desc: Smart identification for modern emergencies. We believe everyone deserves to have their critical medical information instantly accessible when it matters most.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your LifeTag profiles
login.errorGeneric: Sign in failed. Please try again.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Start protecting your loved ones today
register.name: Full Name

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a verification code.
forgotPassword.subtitleStep2: Enter the code we sent to your email and your new password.
forgotPassword.snackbarSuccess: If an account exists with that email, a verification code has been sent.
forgotPassword.snackbarError: Could not send the code. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter the code you received and your new password.
resetPassword.snackbarError: Could not reset password. Check the code and try again.

activate.title: Activate LifeTag
activate.subtitle: Link a new physical band or tag to one of your profiles.
activate.optionA: Option A: Link to an existing profile
activate.optionB: Option B: Create a new profile for this tag

notFound.title: Profile Not Found
notFound.desc: The emergency profile you scanned does not exist or has been removed.

inactive.title: Profile/Device Inactive
inactive.lost: This LifeTag device has been reported as lost by its owner.
inactive.disabled: This emergency profile or device is currently disabled by the owner.

demo.bannerDesc: This is how first responders see the information when they scan a LifeTag.

profile.subtitle: Manage your personal information
